hypothesis: If a multi-agent LLM-based framework equipped with literature search, force-field libraries, and file-manipulation tools is used, then it can autonomously produce reproducible, RASPA-executable input files for complex zeolite adsorption simulations (including multiple adsorbates and up to 500 structures) and accurately extract complete force-field parameters from publications, enabling end-to-end automated simulation setup with correctness comparable to manual human-prepared configurations.
